data.title: YouTube TV and NBCUniversal are in a dispute over rates, risking a blackout of popular shows like "Sunday Night Football" and "The Voice" by the end of the month. 10 million YouTube TV subscribers are at risk.
data.description: YouTube TV, owned by Alphabet, is facing a potential blackout of NBCUniversal content due to a disagreement over rates and terms. The conflict with NBCUniversal, owned by Comcast Corporation, may result in a blackout by the end of the month. YouTube TV, with around 10 million subscribers, is a newer player in the streaming industry. NBCUniversal claims that their proposed rates and terms are the best available. If the dispute is not resolved, popular shows like "Sunday Night Football" and "The Voice" may no longer be available on YouTube TV. This ongoing situation is being closely watched as it unfolds.

data.title: Lao principal's dream connects two schools in China and Laos on International Day of the Deaf.
data.description: On September 28, 2025, as the global community observes the 68th International Day of the Deaf, a touching narrative will be showcased across various platforms. This story revolves around two schools located in different countries but joined by a common sign language. It highlights the unique bond between these educational institutions and emphasizes the importance of fostering connections among individuals with hearing impairments.

data.title: RaySearch unveils cutting-edge innovations at ASTRO 2025 in San Francisco, Sept 28-30, under Coding Energy to End Cancer campaign.
data.description: A company called RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) based in Stockholm shared news about their involvement in the ASTRO event taking place in San Francisco, California from September 28 to 30, 2025. The company will showcase cutting-edge technologies as part of the global initiative "Coding Energy to End Cancer." The event attendees will have the opportunity to witness these innovations firsthand.

data.title: Xinjiang celebrates 70th anniversary with a special bilingual micro-documentary series.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, a special bilingual micro-documentary series titled "Xinjiang: The Place I Call Home" was launched to commemorate the 70th anniversary of the establishment of the Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region. The series aims to provide insight into the region's culture and lifestyle. Viewers are invited to follow the camera as it captures the essence of Xinjiang.

data.title: Fangzhou's 'XingShi' LLM gained spotlight in Nature News & Xinhua for AI innovation in chronic disease care.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has risen by 2% compared to last quarter, now standing at 6.7%. This increase has impacted approximately 1.4 million individuals who are currently seeking employment. Along with this, the stock market experienced a decrease of 500 points, with a notable decline in the tech sector. Additionally, the GDP growth has slowed down to 3.2% from the previous quarter's 4.5%. These economic indicators highlight the challenges faced by the country in the current financial climate.

data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is currently trading at $2.75, reflecting a 3.6% decrease. The technical analysis indicates that the asset is experiencing oversold conditions, particularly in proximity to crucial Bollinger Band support at the same price point.
